parameters.query: ={{`INSERT INTO action_plans (plan_id, date, account_id, actions, compliance_verdict, status) VALUES ('${$json.plan_id}', NOW()::date, 'YOUR_AD_ACCOUNT_ID', '${JSON.stringify($json.actions).replace(/'/g,"''")}'::jsonb, '${$json.compliance_verdict}', 'PENDING_APPROVAL')`}}

parameters.jsonBody:
={"blocks":[{"type":"section","text":{"type":"mrkdwn","text":"🤖 *New Action Plan Ready for Approval*
Plan ID: `" + $json.plan_id + "`

*Summary:* " + $json.summary + "

*Actions (" + $json.action_count + "):*
" + $json.actionLines}},{"type":"actions","elements":[{"type":"button","text":{"type":"plain_text","text":"✅ Approve"},"style":"primary","value":"" + $json.plan_id + "|APPROVED","action_id":"approve_plan"},{"type":"button","text":{"type":"plain_text","text":"❌ Reject"},"style":"danger","value":"" + $json.plan_id + "|REJECTED","action_id":"reject_plan"}]}]}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: =⛔ Action plan blocked by Compliance Agent. Verdict: *{{$('Generate Plan ID').item.json.compliance_verdict}}*\nPlan ID: `{{$('Generate Plan ID').item.json.plan_id}}`
